# Deckle — Full Documentation

> PDF generation API for developers. HTML in, pixel-perfect PDF out.

## Overview

Deckle is a hosted PDF generation API. Send HTML or template data, get pixel-perfect PDFs back in under 3 seconds. No headless browsers to manage.

**Base URL:** `https://api.getdeckle.dev`
**Authentication:** Bearer token in Authorization header (`Authorization: Bearer dk_live_...`)

## SDKs

### TypeScript
```bash
npm install @getdeckle/sdk
```
```typescript
import { Deckle } from '@getdeckle/sdk';
const df = new Deckle(process.env.DECKLE_API_KEY);
```

### Python
```bash
pip install deckle
```
```python
from deckle import Deckle
df = Deckle("dk_live_...")
```

---

## API Reference

### POST /v1/generate

Generate a PDF from HTML or a template.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "html": "<h1>Hello</h1>",
  "options": {
    "format": "A4",
    "margin": "1in",
    "orientation": "portrait",
    "header": "<div>Company Name</div>",
    "footer": "<div>Page {{pageNumber}} of {{totalPages}}</div>",
    "printBackground": true
  },
  "output": "url"
}
```

For template mode:
```json
{
  "template": "tmpl_abc123",
  "data": { "company": "Acme Corp", "total": 1500 },
  "options": { "format": "A4" }
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "gen_abc123",
  "status": "completed",
  "url": "https://cdn.getdeckle.dev/gen_abc123.pdf",
  "pages": 2,
  "file_size": 45230,
  "generation_time_ms": 1840
}
```

**Options:**
- `format`: `"A4"` | `"Letter"` | `"Legal"` | `{ width: string, height: string }`
- `margin`: `"1in"` | `{ top: "1in", right: "0.75in", bottom: "1in", left: "0.75in" }`
- `orientation`: `"portrait"` | `"landscape"`
- `header`: HTML string. Use `{{pageNumber}}` and `{{totalPages}}` for interpolation.
- `footer`: HTML string. Use `{{pageNumber}}` and `{{totalPages}}` for interpolation.
- `printBackground`: boolean (default: true)
- `output`: `"url"` (default) | `"base64"`

---

### GET /v1/generations/:id

Get a specific generation.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "gen_abc123",
  "template_id": null,
  "input_type": "html",
  "status": "completed",
  "url": "https://cdn.getdeckle.dev/gen_abc123.pdf",
  "pages": 2,
  "file_size": 45230,
  "generation_time_ms": 1840,
  "created_at": "2026-02-24T12:00:00.000Z"
}
```

### GET /v1/generations

List generations. Query params: `limit` (default 50, max 100), `offset` (default 0).

---

### POST /v1/templates

Create a template.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "name": "Invoice",
  "html_content": "<h1>Invoice for {{company}}</h1><p>Total: ${{total}}</p>",
  "schema": { "company": "string", "total": "number" }
}
```

Templates use Handlebars syntax: `{{variable}}`, `{{#each items}}...{{/each}}`, `{{#if condition}}...{{/if}}`.

### GET /v1/templates

List all templates.

### GET /v1/templates/:id

Get a template.

### PUT /v1/templates/:id

Update a template. Version increments when `html_content` changes.

### DELETE /v1/templates/:id

Delete a template.

---

### GET /v1/usage

Get usage for current billing period.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "period_start": "2026-02-01",
  "period_end": "2026-02-28",
  "generation_count": 742,
  "total_pages": 1856,
  "total_bytes": 89420800,
  "plan": "starter",
  "limit": 10000
}
```

---

### POST /v1/pdf/* — PDF tools

Operate on existing PDFs (base64 in; `output` is `"url"` by default or `"base64"`).

- `POST /v1/pdf/merge` — `{ pdfs: string[] }` (2+ base64 PDFs, in order) → merged PDF.
- `POST /v1/pdf/split` — `{ pdf, ranges?: number[][] }`. Ranges are 1-indexed inclusive, e.g. `[[1,3],[5]]`; omit to split every page. → `{ parts, total }`.
- `POST /v1/pdf/info` — `{ pdf }` → metadata (page count, title, author, …).
- `POST /v1/pdf/protect` — `{ pdf, user_password?, owner_password?, permissions? }` → AES-256-encrypted PDF.
- `POST /v1/pdf/sign` — `{ pdf, name, reason?, location?, contact?, page?, x?, y?, width?, height?, signature?: { p12, password } }`. Without `signature`: a visual annotation only. With a base64 PKCS#12 credential: a cryptographic PAdES-B-B signature (the P12 is used once and never stored).
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/fill` — `{ pdf, fields: [{ name, value }], flatten? }`.
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/add-fields` — `{ pdf, fields: [{ name, type: "text"|"checkbox"|"dropdown", page, x, y, width?, height?, options?, defaultValue? }] }`.
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/list-fields` — `{ pdf }` → `{ fields, total }`.
- `POST /v1/pdf/pdfa` — `{ pdf, title?, author?, subject? }` → PDF/A-1b archival format.

### React-to-PDF

`POST /v1/generate` accepts a `react` field: a JSX/TSX string with a **default export** function component; props are passed via `data`. Rendered server-side in an isolated-vm sandbox — output must be static (no `useState`/`useEffect`). SDK: `df.fromReact({ react, data?, styles?, options? })`. Component library: `@getdeckle/react-pdf`.

```json
{ "react": "export default function Doc({ title }) { return <h1>{title}</h1>; }", "data": { "title": "Hello" }, "options": { "format": "A4" } }
```

### POST /v1/ai/generate-template — AI template generation

`{ prompt, type?, style?, variables? }` → `{ html_content, variables, type, style }`. Uses Claude to produce a sanitized Handlebars HTML template. Requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` on the server. Rate-limited: 10/day (free), 100/day (paid).

### Batch, Marketplace & Starters

- `POST /v1/generate/batch` — `{ items: [...] }` (1–100 jobs). Async via job queue; returns 202 with IDs; fires a webhook on completion. Accepts an `Idempotency-Key` header.
- `GET /v1/marketplace`, `POST /v1/marketplace/:id/clone|publish|unpublish|report` — community templates.
- `GET /v1/starter-templates`, `POST /v1/starter-templates/:slug/clone` — pre-built starters (browse needs no auth).

### MCP Server — `@deckle/mcp-server`

17 tools for AI agents (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code): `generate_pdf`, `generate_pdf_react`, `generate_pdf_template`, `list_templates`, `create_template`, `generate_template_from_prompt`, `list_starter_templates`, `get_usage`, plus the PDF toolkit — `merge_pdfs`, `split_pdf`, `get_pdf_info`, `protect_pdf`, `sign_pdf`, `fill_pdf_form`, `add_pdf_form_fields`, `list_pdf_form_fields`, `convert_pdf_to_pdfa`. Configure with `DECKLE_API_KEY`.

---

## SDK Methods

### TypeScript SDK

```typescript
const df = new Deckle(apiKey, { baseUrl?, timeout? });

// Generate from HTML
await df.generate({ html, options?, output?, webhook? }): GenerateResponse

// Generate from template
await df.fromTemplate({ template, data, options?, output? }): GenerateResponse

// Generate from a React (JSX/TSX) string with a default export
await df.fromReact({ react, data?, styles?, options? }): GenerateResponse

// Also available: df.batch(...), df.pdf.* (merge/split/info/protect/sign/forms/toPdfA),
// df.marketplace.*, df.starterTemplates.*, df.generateTemplateFromPrompt(...)

// Generations
await df.getGeneration(id): Generation
await df.listGenerations({ limit?, offset? }): ListResponse<Generation>

// Templates
await df.templates.create({ name, html_content, schema?, is_public? }): Template
await df.templates.list(): ListResponse<Template>
await df.templates.get(id): Template
await df.templates.update(id, { name?, html_content?, schema?, is_public? }): Template
await df.templates.delete(id): { deleted: boolean }

// Usage
await df.getUsage(): UsageStats
```

### Python SDK

```python
df = Deckle(api_key, base_url?, timeout?)

# Generate from HTML
df.generate(html, options?, output?, webhook?) -> GenerateResponse

# Generate from template
df.from_template(template, data, options?, output?) -> GenerateResponse

# Generate from a React (JSX/TSX) string with a default export
df.from_react(react, data?, styles?, options?) -> GenerateResponse

# Generations
df.get_generation(id) -> Generation
df.list_generations(limit?, offset?) -> list[Generation]

# Templates
df.templates.create(name, html_content, schema?, is_public?) -> Template
df.templates.list() -> list[Template]
df.templates.get(id) -> Template
df.templates.update(id, name?, html_content?, schema?, is_public?) -> Template
df.templates.delete(id) -> bool

# Usage
df.get_usage() -> UsageStats
```

---

## Error Codes

| Status | Code | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | Invalid request |
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | Invalid API key |
| 403 | USAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED | Monthly limit reached |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | Resource not found |
| 429 | RATE_LIMITED | Too many requests (check Retry-After header) |
| 500 | INTERNAL_ERROR | Server error |

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | PDFs/month | Max Size |
|------|-------|-----------|----------|
| Free | $0 | 1,000 | 10MB |
| Starter | $29/mo | 10,000 | 25MB |
| Pro | $99/mo | 100,000 | 50MB |
| Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited | Unlimited |

## Rate Limits

- Free: 10 req/sec
- Starter/Pro: 100 req/sec
- Enterprise: 500 req/sec
